𝟯𝗗𝗦𝗩𝗚 | Enabling developers to easily convert static SVG files into interactive 3D components within React applications, and providing a user-friendly visual editor for creating and exporting 3D assets.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling developers to easily convert static SVG files into interactive 3D components within React applications, and providing a user-friendly visual editor for creating and exporting 3D assets.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Embeddable `` React component
✅ Visual editor for designing 3D objects from SVGs
✅ Multiple input methods (Text, Pixel Editor, SVG Code, File Upload)
✅ 10 material presets and procedural/custom textures
✅ 7 animation options
✅ Configurable lighting and shadows
✅ Export to PNG, MP4, WebM, GLB, STL, OBJ, PLY
✅ Interactive canvas with drag rotation, scroll zoom, and orbit
✅ Responsive design
✅ Embed code export


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

⭐⭐⭐ 485 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

3dsvg is a monorepo providing a React component for creating interactive 3D visualizations from SVGs and a web-based visual editor to design and export these 3D objects. It simplifies the process of turning 2D vector graphics into dynamic 3D experiences.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/renatoworks/3dsvg

✅ Unlimited isolated browser profiles
✅ Chromium & Firefox engines with advanced fingerprint spoofing
✅ Proxy and VPN support per profile
✅ Local API & MCP for automation

✅ Import profiles from other browsers
✅ Cookie & extension management
✅ Cloud sync with E2E encryption (self-hostable)
✅ Zero telemetry

Donut Browser is an open-source anti-detect browser built with Rust, offering robust privacy and profile management. It allows users to create and manage unlimited isolated browser profiles, each with its own unique fingerprint, cookies, and extensions, powered by Chromium and Firefox engines with advanced spoofing capabilities.

✅ Video acquisition via yt-dlp or local upload
✅ High-accuracy speech recognition (Whisper)
✅ LLM-powered subtitle segmentation and translation
✅ Professional vocabulary replacement
✅ Voice cloning (CosyVoice or custom)
✅ Automatic landscape/portrait video processing and subtitle layout
✅ Cross-platform support (Windows, Linux, macOS)

KrillinAI is a Go-based tool for video translation and dubbing, offering end-to-end localization for cross-platform content. It supports over 100 languages, integrates speech recognition and LLM-based translation, and features voice cloning for professional-sounding dubs.

This repository offers a collection of over 50 practical Python applications, each written with a maximum of 10 lines of code. It covers diverse areas like Machine Learning, GUI, Computer Vision, and API development, aiming to provide simple, understandable, and easily modifiable code examples for learning and experimentation.

TREK is a self-hosted, real-time collaborative travel planner application. It offers features like interactive maps, budget tracking, packing lists, and a journal, all accessible via a Progressive Web App (PWA) with support for Single Sign-On (SSO).
